title: RRB Assistant Loco Pilot ALP Recruitment 2026
feed_title: RRB Assistant Loco Pilot ALP Online form 2026 - Apply Now

seo.title: UPSC CDS II Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 451 Posts
seo.description: UPSC CDS II Recruitment 2026 notification released for 451 vacancies in IMA, INA, Air Force Academy and OTA. Check eligibility, age limit, exam date, salary and apply online details.

intro_content.html: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially released the latest notification for Combined Defence Services Examination II 2026 across various locations in India. A total of 451 vacancies have been announced for eligible candidates who have completed Graduation or Engineering Degree in related fields. The online registration process started from 15 May 2026 and candidates can submit the application form till 14 June 2026. Applicants are advised to check complete eligibility criteria, age limit, application fee, selection process and official guidelines before applying online. (CEN - 01/2026)

application_fee.title: Application Fee

items.label: Payment Mode
items.value: Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI

note: Application fee can be paid through online mode only.

items.label: Age Relaxation
items.value: As per RRB Recruitment Rules for reserved categories

sections.title: Zone Wise Vacancy Details
note: Detailed category-wise vacancy breakup will be available in official notification.

sections.title: Educational Qualification
rows: 10th Pass with ITI in Related Trade
Engineering Diploma / Degree in Relevant Stream
note: Candidates must check trade-wise eligibility details before applying online.

sections.title: How To Apply
steps: Interested candidates who wish to apply for the UPSC CDS II Examination 2026 can submit their application online before 09 June 2026.
Use the Apply Online link provided below under the Important Link section to complete the registration process directly.
Candidates should carefully fill all required personal, educational and communication details in the online application form.
Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature and required documents in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee through online payment modes such as Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI or Internet Banking.
Before final submission, verify all details carefully to avoid mistakes in the application form.
Download and print the final submitted application form for future reference.
Make sure to complete the application process before the deadline 09 June 2026.
छात्रों से अनुरोध है कि आवेदन करने से पहले Official Notification को ध्यानपूर्वक पढ़ें तथा Age Limit, Eligibility, Physical Standards और Educational Qualification की पूरी जानकारी अवश्य जांच लें।

items.question: What is the last date to apply for RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
items.answer: The last date to apply online is 14 June 2026.

items.question: What is the qualification required for RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
items.answer: Candidates must have passed 10th with ITI or possess Engineering Diploma/Degree in related discipline.

items.question: How many vacancies are available in RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
items.answer: A total of 11,127 vacancies have been announced.

items.question: What is the exam date for UPSC CDS II 2026?
items.answer: The UPSC CDS II 2026 written examination will be conducted on 13 September 2026.

items.question: What is the qualification required for UPSC CDS II Vacancy 2026?
items.answer: Candidates must possess Graduation or Engineering Degree according to the academy-wise eligibility criteria mentioned in the notification.
